text: An easier goal is to go from hating to just accepting. We don't need to love every part of ourselves. That is that is asking way too much. That is asking way too much. I think we can love certain parts of ourselves, surely. But to love everything, to love every flaw, I think that's a little bit talking yourself into stuff. And maybe that works for you. Maybe that works for some people. I'm someone who cannot really lie to myself cuz I always know that it's a lie, and so I end up just not believing it. I have a hard time being delusional.
